title: Previous Failed Upgrade
objective: A user state with failed-upgrade residue, used to verify a later upgrade can recover cleanly.

setup.title: Write Failed Upgrade State
setup.intent: Create failed upgrade markers and backup-looking folders.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const root=path.join(home,".openclaw","upgrades","failed-kova"); fs.mkdirSync(root,{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(root,"state.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.failed-upgrade.v1",from:"2026.4.24",to:"2026.4.26",status:"failed",reason:"fixture"},null,2)); fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,".openclaw","backups","failed-kova"),{recursive:true});'
